Who We Are

Built on Integrity, Stone by Stone

Tony Avila Rockwall, Inc. started with a simple mission: to provide El Paso with unparalleled masonry services built on honesty and hard work. Founded by Tony Avila, a lifelong El Pasoan, we understand the unique challenges and opportunities presented by our desert environment and diverse architectural styles.

Our approach is hands-on and detail-oriented. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and unwavering commitment to quality. We treat every project, from small repairs to large-scale construction, with the same level of care and precision.

We're proud to be a part of the El Paso community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our clients and neighbors. When you choose Tony Avila Rockwall, Inc., you're choosing a partner dedicated to your satisfaction and the betterment of our city.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction

Why Choose Tony Avila Rockwall, Inc.

Local Expertise

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Tony and his crew did an excellent job on our new brick patio. They were professional, efficient, and the final product looks amazing! Highly recommend them for any brickwork project.

Maria G. Brick Masonry
“

We had some significant cracks in our stucco after the winter freeze. Tony Avila Rockwall, Inc. came out and repaired it quickly and seamlessly. You can't even tell there was damage before. Great service!

David S. Stucco Repair
“

Tony and his team created a beautiful stone fireplace for our living room. They were very attentive to our design ideas and the craftsmanship is outstanding. It's the centerpiece of our home now!

Linda K. Stone Masonry
“

We needed a retaining wall built to prevent erosion in our backyard. Tony Avila Rockwall, Inc. provided a sturdy and aesthetically pleasing solution. They were reliable and easy to work with.

Robert B. Retaining Wall
“

Our chimney was leaking, and Tony fixed it quickly and efficiently. He explained the problem clearly and provided a fair price. Very professional service.

Jessica M. Chimney Repair
“

Tony Avila Rockwall, Inc. built a solid and durable concrete block wall for our commercial property. The work was completed on time and within budget. We are very satisfied with the results.

Michael P. Concrete Block Masonry

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of brick is best for El Paso's climate?
Clay bricks are generally the most suitable due to their durability and resistance to extreme temperatures and minimal moisture. We can advise on specific types based on your project's requirements.
How long does brick masonry typically last?
With proper installation and maintenance, brick masonry can last for over 100 years. Regular inspections and timely repairs can further extend its lifespan.
Can you match existing brick for repairs?
Yes, we have extensive experience matching existing brick types and mortar colors to ensure seamless repairs that blend seamlessly with the original construction.
